title: senecio leucomallus
intro: Senecio leucomallus, also known as the Snowy Groundsel, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is native to New Zealand and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues. The plant's leaves and roots are rich in saponins, which have anti-inflammatory properties that may help alleviate health issues such as arthritis and asthma, offering relief from pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, Senecio leucomallus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
